recommendations.title: Beautiful Thing
recommendations.overview: During a long, hot summer on the Thamesmead Estate in Southeast London, three teenagers edge towards adulthood.

recommendations.title: Everybody Wants Some!!
recommendations.overview: A comedy that follows a group of friends as they navigate their way through the freedoms and responsibilities of unsupervised adulthood.

recommendations.title: Obvious Child
recommendations.overview: An immature, newly unemployed comic must navigate the murky waters of adulthood after her fling with a graduate student results in an unplanned pregnancy.

recommendations.title: Hey, Did You Score?
recommendations.overview: Three male friends navigate different stages of romantic relationships: One is starting to date; another fears infidelity; the third is divorcing.

recommendations.title: The Myth of the American Sleepover
recommendations.overview: Four young people navigate the suburban wonderland of metro-Detroit looking for love and adventure on the last weekend of summer.

recommendations.title: Falcon Lake
recommendations.overview: A shy teenager on a summer vacation experiences the joy and pain of young adulthood when he forges an unlikely bond with an older girl.

recommendations.title: Waiting...
recommendations.overview: Young employees at Shenaniganz restaurant collectively stave off boredom and adulthood with their antics.

recommendations.title: About Alex
recommendations.overview: When a group of old college friends reunite over a long weekend after one of them attempts suicide, old crushes and resentments shine light on their life decisions, and ultimately push friendships and relationships to the brink.

recommendations.title: Teasing Master Takagi-san: The Movie
recommendations.overview: Takagi and Nishikata’s final summer in junior high is about to begin, and it’s already off to a heartwarming start! When the pair find an abandoned kitten, they decide to work together and take care of Hana, their adorable new companion until they ca

recommendations.title: Your Fault
recommendations.overview: The love between Noah and Nick seems unwavering despite their parents' attempts to separate them. But his job and her entry into college open up their lives to new relationships that will shake the foundations of both their relationship and the Leist
